brief_summary_anonymized: Retail brand — National Day collection launch. Needs heritage + modernity balance.
strategic_insight: National Day is modernity meets heritage — never one alone. The collection visualizes that balance through specific design choices (thobe with modern cut, abaya with sadu pattern).
execution_summary: Visual: collection pieces shown in both heritage settings (mud-brick courtyard) and modern settings (Riyadh skyline). The same garment connects the two contexts.
what_made_it_work: Same-garment-two-contexts visual structure embodies the message
Saudi green at full strength signals occasion specificity
Specific Saudi visual cues (thobe with modern cut, sadu pattern) signal cultural fluency
what_would_NOT_transplant: Requires brand with both heritage + modern credibility
Won't work for brands with single-aesthetic positioning
